title: Marginalia — independent city quarterly
prompt: A single-page site for Marginalia — an independent print quarterly about the future of cities: housing, transit, public space, and the people who shape them. Audience: urbanists, architects, and curious city-dwellers. The one action: subscribe to the next issue. Feel: editorial, warm, literary, print-rooted — long-form and text-forward, not a tech product.
